cipher: The deed dearest to Allah Ta'ala is that which is most consistent, even if small.
full: The deed dearest to Allah Ta'ala is that which is most consistent, even if small.

cipher: When someone distinguished from community visits you, honour him.
full: When someone distinguished from community visits you, honour him.

cipher: Gladly accept Allah Ta'ala's will and you will truly become a zaahid.
full: Gladly accept Allah Ta'ala's will and you will truly become a zaahid.

cipher: Perfect your wudu' and you will live longer.
full: Perfect your wudu' and you will live longer.

cipher: Completing an act of kindness is better than starting it.
full: Completing an act of kindness is better than starting it. If you start an act of kindness, complete it.

cipher: Seek help in the fulfillment of your needs by concealing them.
full: Seek help in the fulfillment of your needs by concealing them.

cipher: Do good to the worthy and the unworthy.
full: Do good to the worthy and the unworthy. If a person is worthy, then he is deserving of that good. If a person is unworthy, then you are one who does good regardless.

cipher: Know: if all Creation unites in order to provide you with something that Allah Ta'ala does not intend to give you, it will be unable to do so.
full: Know: if all Creation unites in order to provide you with something that Allah Ta'ala does not intend to give you, it will be unable to do so. Likewise, all Creation will be powerless to prevent that which Allah Ta'ala intends reaches you.

cipher: Act according to Allah Ta'ala's faraa'id (what He has obligated) and you will truly become one who worships Him.
full: Act according to Allah Ta'ala's faraa'id (what He has obligated) and you will truly become one who worships Him.

cipher: The bane of beauty is vanity.
full: The bane of beauty is vanity.

cipher: The bane of generosity is extravagance.
full: The bane of generosity is extravagance.

cipher: The bane of speech is lying.
full: The bane of speech is lying.

cipher: The bane of nobility is to be overproud.
full: The bane of nobility is to be overproud.

cipher: The bane of forbearance is foolishness.
full: The bane of forbearance is foolishness.

cipher: The bane of munificence is recounting favours.
full: The bane of munificence is recounting favours.

cipher: The bane of courage is oppression.
full: The bane of courage is oppression. Courage should not lead one to transgress the limits of what is just and right.

cipher: The bane of cleverness is conceitedness.
full: The bane of cleverness is conceitedness.

cipher: The bane of 'ibaadat is listlessness.
full: The bane of 'ibaadat is listlessness.

cipher: The bane of knowledge is to forget.
full: The bane of knowledge is to forget.

cipher: Enquire about your neighbour before purchasing a house and about your companion before embarking upon a journey.
full: Enquire about your neighbour before purchasing a house and about your companion before embarking upon a journey.

cipher: The dictation of good is better than silence.
full: The dictation of good is better than silence. However, silence is better than the dictation of evil.

cipher: What most entitles people to enter jannat is the taqwaa of Allah Ta'ala and good character.
full: What most entitles people to enter jannat is the taqwaa of Allah Ta'ala and good character.

cipher: Jealousy consumes hasanaat (good deeds) the way fire consumes wood.
full: Jealousy consumes hasanaat (good deeds) the way fire consumes wood.

cipher: Through the goodness of his character, a man attains the status of one dedicated to rozah and namaaz.
full: Through the goodness of his character, a man attains the status of one dedicated to rozah and namaaz.

cipher: In all His justice and fairness, Allah Ta'ala has determined that comfort and relief shall reside in faith and contentment.
full: In all His justice and fairness, Allah Ta'ala has determined that comfort and relief shall reside in faith and contentment. Likewise, He has determined that worry and sorrow shall reside in doubt and discontentment.

cipher: When the intention behind a deed is to obtain aakherat, Allah Ta'ala grants dunyaa along with aakherat.
full: When the intention behind a deed is to obtain aakherat, Allah Ta'ala grants dunyaa along with aakherat. However, when the intention is worldly, He refuses to grant aakherat.

cipher: Allah Ta'ala prohibits you from engaging in gossip, squandering (wasting) wealth and questioning too much (either due to excessive inquisitiveness or for material gain).
full: Allah Ta'ala prohibits you from engaging in gossip, squandering (wasting) wealth and questioning too much (either due to excessive inquisitiveness or for material gain).

cipher: A small number of deeds undertaken with knowledge and understanding amounts to a lot.
full: A small number of deeds undertaken with knowledge and understanding amounts to a lot. However, a large number of deeds carried out in ignorance and without understanding amounts to little.

cipher: The person who prohibits halaal is the same as the one who permits haraam.
full: The person who prohibits halaal is the same as the one who permits haraam. Prohibiting halaal is as sinful as permitting haraam.

cipher: It is Sunnat to walk one's guest to the door of the house.
full: It is Sunnat to walk one's guest to the door of the house.

cipher: Beware of assumptions, for statements based upon them are most likely to be untruthful.
full: Beware of assumptions, for statements based upon them are most likely to be untruthful.

cipher: Barakat lies with your elders.
full: Barakat lies with your elders.

cipher: The cowardly businessman goes unrewarded, while the one who is courageous is rewarded with his livelihood.
full: The cowardly businessman goes unrewarded, while the one who is courageous is rewarded with his livelihood.

cipher: In the zill (shade) of the 'arsh (Throne), on the day there is no other zill, will be the man who leaves his home to trade and seek sustenance from Allah Ta'ala's grace.
full: In the zill (shade) of the 'arsh (Throne), on the day there is no other zill, will be the man who leaves his home to trade and seek sustenance from Allah Ta'ala's grace. He does this to prevent himself from asking of others and to provide for his family.

cipher: Planning is one half of life. Proper planning is essential for a fulfilling life.
full: Planning is one half of life. Proper planning is essential for a fulfilling life.

cipher: Exchange gifts with one another for doing so increases affection and cleanses hearts of grudges and ill will.
full: Exchange gifts with one another for doing so increases affection and cleanses hearts of grudges and ill will.

cipher: Three people remain untouched by the trials and tribulations of this world and the hereafter:
full: Three people remain untouched by the trials and tribulations of this world and the hereafter: the person who offers sincere advice to Muslims, the person who guides towards good, the person who is content with Allah Ta'ala's judgement and will.

cipher: Having a sense of shame is goodness in its entirety.
full: Having a sense of shame is goodness in its entirety.

cipher: All Creation is a family dependent on Allah Ta'ala.
full: All Creation is a family dependent on Allah Ta'ala. The most beloved of all Creation to Him, therefore, is the one who benefits His family the most.

cipher: Du'aa' is a Mumin's weapon.
full: Du'aa' is a Mumin's weapon.

cipher: The person who provides water should be the last to drink.
full: The person who provides water should be the last to drink.

cipher: Greet your family with salaam and the well-being of your home will greatly increase.
full: Greet your family with salaam and the well-being of your home will greatly increase.

cipher: When you meet someone from my Ummah, greet him with salaam and your hasanaat will greatly increase.
full: When you meet someone from my Ummah, greet him with salaam and your hasanaat will greatly increase.

cipher: The worst of all earnings are earnings from interest.
full: The worst of all earnings are earnings from interest.

cipher: Sadaqah given in secret extinguishes Allah Ta'ala's anger.
full: Sadaqah given in secret extinguishes Allah Ta'ala's anger.

cipher: The reward of a person who is thankful for what he eats is similar to that of one who endures his rozah.
full: The reward of a person who is thankful for what he eats is similar to that of one who endures his rozah.

cipher: Seeking knowledge is obligatory upon every Muslim man and woman.
full: Seeking knowledge is obligatory upon every Muslim man and woman.

cipher: I am amazed by a person who laughs very loudly, and all the while he is unaware of whether he has pleased Allah Ta'ala or angered Him.
full: I am amazed by a person who laughs very loudly, and all the while he is unaware of whether he has pleased Allah Ta'ala or angered Him.

cipher: I am amazed by a person who desires worldly pleasures and all the while Death seeks him.
full: I am amazed by a person who desires worldly pleasures and all the while Death seeks him.

cipher: Knowledge is a Mumin's companion, Forbearance together with Sagacity is his vizier, Intellect is his guide, Action is his leader, Competence is his father, Kindness is his brother and Endurance is the commander of his armies.
full: Knowledge is a Mumin's companion, Forbearance together with Sagacity is his vizier, Intellect is his guide, Action is his leader, Competence is his father, Kindness is his brother and Endurance is the commander of his armies.

cipher: Al-Quran itself is the cure and du'aa' itself is 'ibaadat.
full: Al-Quran itself is the cure and du'aa' itself is 'ibaadat.

cipher: Speak al-Haq (what is true and right) even though it may be bitter.
full: Speak al-Haq (what is true and right) even though it may be bitter.

cipher: The betrayal is great when your brother believes you to be truthful about what you tell him because it comes from you, and all along you are lying.
full: The betrayal is great when your brother believes you to be truthful about what you tell him because it comes from you, and all along you are lying.

cipher: The honour of a home lies in sweeping it (keeping it clean).
full: The honour of a home lies in sweeping it (keeping it clean).

cipher: The honour of a garment lies in folding it properly.
full: The honour of a garment lies in folding it properly.

cipher: Do not speak ill of Muslims behind their backs nor pursue their flaws.
full: Do not speak ill of Muslims behind their backs nor pursue their flaws.

cipher: Do not sleep unless you are in a state of tahaarat, for if you pass away while sleeping in a state of tahaarat you will die a shaheed.
full: Do not sleep unless you are in a state of tahaarat, for if you pass away while sleeping in a state of tahaarat you will die a shaheed.

cipher: Do not make a promise to your brother that you will not keep.
full: Do not make a promise to your brother that you will not keep.

cipher: Not a single one of you should ever wish for death as a result of a hardship that has befallen him.
full: Not a single one of you should ever wish for death as a result of a hardship that has befallen him.

cipher: A Muslim is not permitted to sever relations with his brother for more than three days.
full: A Muslim is not permitted to sever relations with his brother for more than three days.

cipher: A man will not perfect his belief in Allah Ta'ala without five qualities:
full: A man will not perfect his belief in Allah Ta'ala without five qualities: having faith in Allah Ta'ala, entrusting all matters to Him, submitting to His command, accepting His judgement gladly, enduring His trials.

cipher: A Mumin will not be bitten twice in the same snake nest.
full: A Mumin will not be bitten twice in the same snake nest. A Mumin will stay away from what has harmed him once before.

cipher: A powerful person is not one who brings another to the ground.
full: A powerful person is not one who brings another to the ground. Truly powerful is he who controls himself when angry.

cipher: A wealthy person is not one who has an abundance of material possessions.
full: A wealthy person is not one who has an abundance of material possessions. Truly wealthy is he who is content with whatever he has and is not dependent on anyone.

cipher: A person is not one of us if he does not respect elders, does not show kindness to the young, does not instruct himself or others towards that which is good, nor does he prevent himself or others from that which is wrong.
full: A person is not one of us if he does not respect elders, does not show kindness to the young, does not instruct himself or others towards that which is good, nor does he prevent himself or others from that which is wrong.

cipher: A youth will not show deference to an elder out of consideration for his age, but Allah Ta'ala will provide him with someone who will show him deference when he reaches that age as well.
full: A youth will not show deference to an elder out of consideration for his age, but Allah Ta'ala will provide him with someone who will show him deference when he reaches that age as well.

cipher: A man does not open for himself the door that leads to begging, but Allah Ta'ala opens for him the door that leads to poverty.
full: A man does not open for himself the door that leads to begging, but Allah Ta'ala opens for him the door that leads to poverty.

cipher: No act of Allah Ta'ala's taa'at (obedience) is rewarded more swiftly than the act of ensuring good relations with one's family and relatives.
full: No act of Allah Ta'ala's taa'at (obedience) is rewarded more swiftly than the act of ensuring good relations with one's family and relatives.

cipher: A father has not given his child a better gift than good manners.
full: A father has not given his child a better gift than good manners.

cipher: A vile companion is like a blacksmith fanning a fire with his bellows:
full: A vile companion is like a blacksmith fanning a fire with his bellows: even if he does not burn you with the sparks of his fire, his odour will certainly stay with you.

cipher: A virtuous companion is like a merchant of Dari musk:
full: A virtuous companion is like a merchant of Dari musk: even if he does not offer you his perfume, his fragrance will certainly linger with you.

cipher: A Mumin is like a honeybee:
full: A Mumin is like a honeybee: it does not consume nor give except that which is pure and wholesome.

cipher: He whose advice is sought is considered to be trustworthy.
full: He whose advice is sought is considered to be trustworthy. Therefore, it is his responsibility to give reliable, honest advice.

cipher: A Muslim is one from whose words and actions other Muslims remain unharmed.
full: A Muslim is one from whose words and actions other Muslims remain unharmed.

cipher: If a person wishes to be the wealthiest of all people, he should rely more on what is in Allah Ta'ala's hands than what is in his own.
full: If a person wishes to be the wealthiest of all people, he should rely more on what is in Allah Ta'ala's hands than what is in his own.

cipher: If a person builds a masjid for Allah Ta'ala, even if like the nest of a sandgrouse, Allah Ta'ala will build for him a home in jannat.
full: If a person builds a masjid for Allah Ta'ala, even if like the nest of a sandgrouse, Allah Ta'ala will build for him a home in jannat.

cipher: He who humbles himself before Allah Ta'ala, Allah Ta'ala will raise him.
full: He who humbles himself before Allah Ta'ala, Allah Ta'ala will raise him.

cipher: The merit of a man's Islam is in disregarding matters that do not concern him.
full: The merit of a man's Islam is in disregarding matters that do not concern him.

cipher: Beware of stinginess and greed, for they have truly brought ruin on those before you.
full: Beware of stinginess and greed, for they have truly brought ruin on those before you.

cipher: Prefer for your Mumin brother what you prefer for yourself. Prefer for all people what you prefer for yourself. Prefer for all others (all of Creation) what you prefer for yourself.
full: Prefer for your Mumin brother what you prefer for yourself. Prefer for all people what you prefer for yourself. Prefer for all others (all of Creation) what you prefer for yourself.

cipher: Kufr (unbelief), at its very least, is for a man to hear a remark from his Mumin brother and remember it with the intention of censuring him. Those who act in this way have no share of good in the hereafter.
full: Kufr (unbelief), at its very least, is for a man to hear a remark from his Mumin brother and remember it with the intention of censuring him. Those who act in this way have no share of good in the hereafter.

cipher: When you become angry, desist from speaking ill.
full: When you become angry, desist from speaking ill.

cipher: When a man passes by while food has been placed before you, invite him if he greets you all with salaam. If he fails to do so, then do not invite him.
full: When a man passes by while food has been placed before you, invite him if he greets you all with salaam. If he fails to do so, then do not invite him.

cipher: Pay a labourer his wages before his perspiration dries.
full: Pay a labourer his wages before his perspiration dries.

cipher: Spread goodwill and peace by reciting salaam, engage in feeding others, ensure good relations with kin and pray namaaz at night while others sleep; you will enter jannat in peace.
full: Spread goodwill and peace by reciting salaam, engage in feeding others, ensure good relations with kin and pray namaaz at night while others sleep; you will enter jannat in peace.

cipher: The worthiest of all merits is to: reconcile with those who have severed relations with you, be generous to those who have deprived you, show kindness to those who have wronged you, forgive those who have treated you unjustly.
full: The worthiest of all merits is to: reconcile with those who have severed relations with you, be generous to those who have deprived you, show kindness to those who have wronged you, forgive those who have treated you unjustly.

cipher: The most honourable quality of the Nabiyeen, Siddiqeen, Shohadaa' and Saaleheen is visiting one another for the sake of Allah Ta'ala.
full: The most honourable quality of the Nabiyeen, Siddiqeen, Shohadaa' and Saaleheen is visiting one another for the sake of Allah Ta'ala.

cipher: Shall I not inform you of two things which require little effort, yet provide great reward? From among the deeds with which one meets Allah Ta'ala there are none such as these: silence and good character.
full: Shall I not inform you of two things which require little effort, yet provide great reward? From among the deeds with which one meets Allah Ta'ala there are none such as these: silence and good character.

cipher: Trustworthiness brings forth livelihood.
full: Trustworthiness brings forth livelihood.

cipher: Thinking positively and presuming good in others are a form of better ibaadat.
full: Thinking positively and presuming good in others are a form of better ibaadat.

cipher: The best of your clothes are those that are white.
full: The best of your clothes are those that are white.

cipher: Sadaqah wards off death of an unpleasant manner as do acts of kindness.
full: Sadaqah wards off death of an unpleasant manner as do acts of kindness.

cipher: Indeed, replying to a letter is as mandatory as responding to a salaam.
full: Indeed, replying to a letter is as mandatory as responding to a salaam.

cipher: There is indeed a door to everything, and the door to 'ibaadat is rozah.
full: There is indeed a door to everything, and the door to 'ibaadat is rozah.

cipher: Look at those who are beneath you (less fortunate) and not at those who are above, for it is befitting that you do not belittle Allah Ta'ala's blessings upon you.
full: Look at those who are beneath you (less fortunate) and not at those who are above, for it is befitting that you do not belittle Allah Ta'ala's blessings upon you.

cipher: Following a meal, remove particles of food lodged between your teeth. For doing so leads to the health of the canines and molars, and draws a man's livelihood towards him.
full: Following a meal, remove particles of food lodged between your teeth. For doing so leads to the health of the canines and molars, and draws a man's livelihood towards him.

cipher: Be sure to have dinner even if only a handful of inferior quality dates because forgoing dinner leads to senility.
full: Be sure to have dinner even if only a handful of inferior quality dates because forgoing dinner leads to senility.

cipher: The Jamaa'at (of Mumineen) is a blessing while separation [from it] is torment.
full: The Jamaa'at (of Mumineen) is a blessing while separation [from it] is torment.

cipher: Asking a worthy question is one-half of knowledge.
full: Asking a worthy question is one-half of knowledge.

cipher: Fear and awe of Allah Ta'ala lie at the head of every wisdom.
full: Fear and awe of Allah Ta'ala lie at the head of every wisdom.

cipher: The best livelihood is that which suffices.
full: The best livelihood is that which suffices.

cipher: Belittling this world and forsaking its pleasures comfort the soul and body, while longing for it heightens sorrow and worry.
full: Belittling this world and forsaking its pleasures comfort the soul and body, while longing for it heightens sorrow and worry.

cipher: A person in need is sent by Allah Ta'ala. Therefore, by giving him [something] one gives to Allah Ta'ala, whereas by denying him one denies Allah Ta'ala. Allah Ta'ala sends such a person as a trial for mankind and as a means of bestowing them reward.
full: A person in need is sent by Allah Ta'ala. Therefore, by giving him [something] one gives to Allah Ta'ala, whereas by denying him one denies Allah Ta'ala. Allah Ta'ala sends such a person as a trial for mankind and as a means of bestowing them reward.

cipher: Brushing one's teeth makes the mouth fragrant and healthy, and pleases the Lord.
full: Brushing one's teeth makes the mouth fragrant and healthy, and pleases the Lord.

cipher: Brushing teeth increases one's eloquence.
full: Brushing teeth increases one's eloquence.

cipher: Your principal idaam is salt.
full: Your principal idaam is salt.

cipher: An act of sadaqah is rewarded ten-fold and Qardan Hasanaa eighteen-fold. Being gracious towards Mumineen brethren is rewarded twenty-fold, whereas graciousness towards family and relatives is rewarded twenty-four-fold; it lengthens one's life and banishes poverty.
full: An act of sadaqah is rewarded ten-fold and Qardan Hasanaa eighteen-fold. Being gracious towards Mumineen brethren is rewarded twenty-fold, whereas graciousness towards family and relatives is rewarded twenty-four-fold; it lengthens one's life and banishes poverty.

cipher: An act of sadaqah extinguishes sins the way water extinguishes fire.
full: An act of sadaqah extinguishes sins the way water extinguishes fire.

cipher: Be gracious to your family and relatives even if only with salaam.
full: Be gracious to your family and relatives even if only with salaam.

cipher: A promise is a debt. A promise should be fulfilled just as a debt should be repaid.
full: A promise is a debt. A promise should be fulfilled just as a debt should be repaid.

cipher: A promise is a gift.
full: A promise is a gift.

cipher: That I may gather a few of my companions upon even a measure\
full: That I may gather a few of my companions upon even a measure\

cipher: The tyrant among men has three attributes: He wrongs those above him through disobedience. He persecutes those below him through repression. He supports fellow tyrants.
full: The tyrant among men has three attributes: He wrongs those above him through disobedience. He persecutes those below him through repression. He supports fellow tyrants.

cipher: One should not obey the created if it entails disobeying the Creator.
full: One should not obey the created if it entails disobeying the Creator.

cipher: He who is ungrateful to people is ungrateful to Allah Ta'ala.
full: He who is ungrateful to people is ungrateful to Allah Ta'ala.

cipher: If you trust Allah Ta'ala as you should, He will provide sustenance for you the way He does for a bird: in the morning it leaves hungry and in the evening it returns having had its fill.
full: If you trust Allah Ta'ala as you should, He will provide sustenance for you the way He does for a bird: in the morning it leaves hungry and in the evening it returns having had its fill.

cipher: He who attaches little value to namaaz is not of me, nor is he who consumes an intoxicant; he will not meet me at Haud-e-Kawthar, by Allah, he will not.
full: He who attaches little value to namaaz is not of me, nor is he who consumes an intoxicant; he will not meet me at Haud-e-Kawthar, by Allah, he will not.

cipher: A man has not swallowed a mouthful more pleasing to Allah Ta'ala than that of uncontrollable anger, or a mouthful of patience in a time of hardship.
full: A man has not swallowed a mouthful more pleasing to Allah Ta'ala than that of uncontrollable anger, or a mouthful of patience in a time of hardship.

cipher: There is no deed greater than feeding the hungry.
full: There is no deed greater than feeding the hungry.

cipher: A man does not believe in Allah Ta'ala when he passes the night on a full stomach while his neighbour remains hungry.
full: A man does not believe in Allah Ta'ala when he passes the night on a full stomach while his neighbour remains hungry.

cipher: A Mumin is defined as one whom people deem trustworthy in all matters pertaining to their wealth, souls and bodies.
full: A Mumin is defined as one whom people deem trustworthy in all matters pertaining to their wealth, souls and bodies.

cipher: Procrastination by the wealthy is cruelty. For example, when the wealthy procrastinate in fulfilling a promise or repaying a debt.
full: Procrastination by the wealthy is cruelty. For example, when the wealthy procrastinate in fulfilling a promise or repaying a debt.

cipher: When Allah Ta'ala has favoured a person with His blessings, he should make them visible on his own self.
full: When Allah Ta'ala has favoured a person with His blessings, he should make them visible on his own self.

cipher: If one worships Allah Ta'ala with ikhlaas for forty days, springs of wisdom from within his heart will flow upon his tongue.
full: If one worships Allah Ta'ala with ikhlaas for forty days, springs of wisdom from within his heart will flow upon his tongue.

cipher: The person who imitates a group of people is one of them.
full: The person who imitates a group of people is one of them.

cipher: What an excellent idaam is vinegar, what an excellent idaam is olive oil. Olive oil is the fragrance and idaam of the Prophets AS, it is mubarak and no home is lacking in something to eat with bread if there is vinegar.
full: What an excellent idaam is vinegar, what an excellent idaam is olive oil. Olive oil is the fragrance and idaam of the Prophets AS, it is mubarak and no home is lacking in something to eat with bread if there is vinegar.

cipher: There are two blessings in which many people stand deceived: health and leisure. Most people take their health and spare time for granted.
full: There are two blessings in which many people stand deceived: health and leisure. Most people take their health and spare time for granted.

cipher: O son of Adam! Every day you are blessed with your livelihood yet you grieve, whereas every day your life diminishes yet you rejoice.
full: O son of Adam! Every day you are blessed with your livelihood yet you grieve, whereas every day your life diminishes yet you rejoice.

cipher: The barakat of a meal is complete when: bismillah is recited at its beginning, gratitude for Allah Ta'ala is expressed at its end, both hands are washed before and after eating, the hands that partake of it are many, it is halaal.
full: The barakat of a meal is complete when: bismillah is recited at its beginning, gratitude for Allah Ta'ala is expressed at its end, both hands are washed before and after eating, the hands that partake of it are many, it is halaal.

cipher: To spare oneself from having to make an excuse is more honourable than making one even when honest.
full: To spare oneself from having to make an excuse is more honourable than making one even when honest.

cipher: Beseech Allah Ta'ala for the descent of [your] livelihood by giving sadaqah (by giving zakaat wholeheartedly).
full: Beseech Allah Ta'ala for the descent of [your] livelihood by giving sadaqah (by giving zakaat wholeheartedly).

cipher: The best of all things is having faith in Allah Ta'ala.
full: The best of all things is having faith in Allah Ta'ala.

cipher: Justness sustains love and affection.
full: Justness sustains love and affection.

cipher: The completion of ikhlaas is in refraining from disobedience.
full: The completion of ikhlaas is in refraining from disobedience.

cipher: Generosity is the protector of good repute.
full: Generosity is the protector of good repute.

cipher: The most valuable words are those that are validated by deeds and actions.
full: The most valuable words are those that are validated by deeds and actions.

cipher: Time is [divided into] two days; one which is in your favour and the other against. When it is in your favour do not be boastful, and when it is against be patient.
full: Time is [divided into] two days; one which is in your favour and the other against. When it is in your favour do not be boastful, and when it is against be patient.

cipher: Even a single sin is one too many, whereas a thousand deeds of obedience are too few.
full: Even a single sin is one too many, whereas a thousand deeds of obedience are too few.

cipher: Look after your father; your son will look after you.
full: Look after your father; your son will look after you.

cipher: Some words can be more piercing than the blow of an arrow.
full: Some words can be more piercing than the blow of an arrow.

cipher: Your delight with this world is [a kind of] self-delusion.
full: Your delight with this world is [a kind of] self-delusion.

cipher: Cast aside your pride, discard your arrogance and think of your grave.
full: Cast aside your pride, discard your arrogance and think of your grave.

cipher: Be sure to trim the hair from your moustache that grows on to your upper lip, taking care no part of it is ever covered by hair.
full: Be sure to trim the hair from your moustache that grows on to your upper lip, taking care no part of it is ever covered by hair.

cipher: Let your beard grow; never trim nor shave it.
full: Let your beard grow; never trim nor shave it.

cipher: Adhere to Allah Ta'ala's taqwaa regardless of where you may be.
full: Adhere to Allah Ta'ala's taqwaa regardless of where you may be.

cipher: The last morsels left in a dish contain the most barakat.
full: The last morsels left in a dish contain the most barakat.

cipher: Firishtah bless with salawaat and pray for the increased prosperity of those who wipe a dish clean with their fingers and eat every last morsel of food; they will receive manifold hasanat.
full: Firishtah bless with salawaat and pray for the increased prosperity of those who wipe a dish clean with their fingers and eat every last morsel of food; they will receive manifold hasanat.

cipher: Practise zohd in this world and Allah Ta'ala will grace you with His affection.
full: Practise zohd in this world and Allah Ta'ala will grace you with His affection.

cipher: Be indifferent to that which is in the hands of others and they will become fond of you.
full: Be indifferent to that which is in the hands of others and they will become fond of you.

cipher: Be merciful to those on earth; you will be shown mercy from the heavens.
full: Be merciful to those on earth; you will be shown mercy from the heavens.

cipher: Treat your children with dignity and ensure that they are well-mannered.
full: Treat your children with dignity and ensure that they are well-mannered.

cipher: Take counsel with the wise and you will be guided. Do not disregard their counsel lest you become regretful.
full: Take counsel with the wise and you will be guided. Do not disregard their counsel lest you become regretful.

cipher: Allah Ta'ala adores cleanliness; wretched is he who is filthy.
full: Allah Ta'ala adores cleanliness; wretched is he who is filthy.

cipher: Indeed, Allah Ta'ala despises a family that consumes the flesh of their dead brother by indulging in backbiting.
full: Indeed, Allah Ta'ala despises a family that consumes the flesh of their dead brother by indulging in backbiting.

cipher: Is there any illness more severe than stinginess?
full: Is there any illness more severe than stinginess?

cipher: Awaiting relief from suffering through patience is 'ibaadat.
full: Awaiting relief from suffering through patience is 'ibaadat.

cipher: Beware of being enamoured of this world for being so is the root of all sins.
full: Beware of being enamoured of this world for being so is the root of all sins.

cipher: The material world ruins he who seeks it and all the while he is never able to truly possess it.
full: The material world ruins he who seeks it and all the while he is never able to truly possess it.

cipher: Three people will remain untouched by hellfire on the Day of Qiyaamat: the one who obeys his parents and treats them with reverence and kindness, the woman who respects her husband's wishes, the servant who fulfils his obligations towards Allah Ta'ala and his master.
full: Three people will remain untouched by hellfire on the Day of Qiyaamat: the one who obeys his parents and treats them with reverence and kindness, the woman who respects her husband's wishes, the servant who fulfils his obligations towards Allah Ta'ala and his master.

cipher: A sense of shame and modesty brings about nothing but good.
full: A sense of shame and modesty brings about nothing but good.

cipher: Jannat lies beneath the feet of mothers.
full: Jannat lies beneath the feet of mothers.

cipher: The finest amongst you is he who learns and teaches al-Quran al-Majeed.
full: The finest amongst you is he who learns and teaches al-Quran al-Majeed.

cipher: Good is a habit, and evil is to remain obdurate. In order to do good a man must make a habit of it. Doing evil, however, is inherent in human nature and overcoming it requires self-discipline.
full: Good is a habit, and evil is to remain obdurate. In order to do good a man must make a habit of it. Doing evil, however, is inherent in human nature and overcoming it requires self-discipline.

cipher: Zakaat is the bridge to Islam. A person who does not give zakaat is not a Muslim.
full: Zakaat is the bridge to Islam. A person who does not give zakaat is not a Muslim.

cipher: Refresh and reinvigorate your spirit and intellect time after time.
full: Refresh and reinvigorate your spirit and intellect time after time.

cipher: Be comforting to others; do not drive them away.
full: Be comforting to others; do not drive them away.

cipher: Travel; you will benefit.
full: Travel; you will benefit.

cipher: In this world and the next, the king of all food is meat and the king of all drinks is water.
full: In this world and the next, the king of all food is meat and the king of all drinks is water.

cipher: You should regularly consume meat for it ensures the growth of flesh. The character of he who fails to eat meat once within forty days will deteriorate.
full: You should regularly consume meat for it ensures the growth of flesh. The character of he who fails to eat meat once within forty days will deteriorate.

cipher: Become healthy by doing rozah.
full: Become healthy by doing rozah.

cipher: Blessed is he who: spends wealth that he has earned without disobeying Allah Ta'ala, associates himself with the wise and those who understand the intricacies of Shariat, distances himself from the sinful and disobedient.
full: Blessed is he who: spends wealth that he has earned without disobeying Allah Ta'ala, associates himself with the wise and those who understand the intricacies of Shariat, distances himself from the sinful and disobedient.

cipher: A man who takes back a gift is like a dog that eats its own vomit.
full: A man who takes back a gift is like a dog that eats its own vomit.

cipher: Adhere to the zikr and remembrance of Allah Ta'ala for it is the fountainhead of all good.
full: Adhere to the zikr and remembrance of Allah Ta'ala for it is the fountainhead of all good.

cipher: 'Ajwah are from jannat.
full: 'Ajwah are from jannat.

cipher: Remain in this world as if you are a stranger in a foreign land and consider yourself among those who have already departed. Always prepare yourself for the hereafter.
full: Remain in this world as if you are a stranger in a foreign land and consider yourself among those who have already departed. Always prepare yourself for the hereafter.

cipher: Visit the ill and attend funerals; they will cause you to remember the hereafter.
full: Visit the ill and attend funerals; they will cause you to remember the hereafter.

cipher: Allah Ta'ala has cursed alcohol with la'nat and so too the one who produces it, commissions it, sells it, purchases it, drinks it, serves it, benefits from its sale, transports it and the one to whom it is being transported.
full: Allah Ta'ala has cursed alcohol with la'nat and so too the one who produces it, commissions it, sells it, purchases it, drinks it, serves it, benefits from its sale, transports it and the one to whom it is being transported.

cipher: Allah Ta'ala has cursed interest with la'nat and so too the one who takes it, gives it, sells it, buys it, records it and the two who act as witnesses to its transactions.
full: Allah Ta'ala has cursed interest with la'nat and so too the one who takes it, gives it, sells it, buys it, records it and the two who act as witnesses to its transactions.

cipher: A man does not give off a pleasant scent but his intellectual capacity has been enhanced.
full: A man does not give off a pleasant scent but his intellectual capacity has been enhanced.

cipher: If the son of Adam were to have [in his possession] two wadis of wealth, he would still desire a third.
full: If the son of Adam were to have [in his possession] two wadis of wealth, he would still desire a third.

cipher: A Mumin steadfast in his faith is like a date palm (which always remains firm). A Mumin weak in his faith is like a small seedling (which wavers in the slightest wind).
full: A Mumin steadfast in his faith is like a date palm (which always remains firm). A Mumin weak in his faith is like a small seedling (which wavers in the slightest wind).

cipher: When one favours love and devotion to Allah Ta'ala over that to others, then Allah Ta'ala will suffice him from being dependent on them.
full: When one favours love and devotion to Allah Ta'ala over that to others, then Allah Ta'ala will suffice him from being dependent on them.

cipher: When a person completes his wudu', prays his namaaz well and as prescribed, gives the zakaat of his wealth, controls his anger, cages his tongue, shows kindness, seeks his Lord's forgiveness, and expresses his devotion to my Ahlebait, then he has fulfilled the requisites of imaan, and the doors of jannat are open for him.
full: When a person completes his wudu', prays his namaaz well and as prescribed, gives the zakaat of his wealth, controls his anger, cages his tongue, shows kindness, seeks his Lord's forgiveness, and expresses his devotion to my Ahlebait, then he has fulfilled the requisites of imaan, and the doors of jannat are open for him.

cipher: One who yearns for jannat hastens towards good deeds.
full: One who yearns for jannat hastens towards good deeds.

cipher: One who fears hellfire shuns worldly temptations.
full: One who fears hellfire shuns worldly temptations.

cipher: The one who gives Qardan Hasanaa is bestowed with the reward of offering that amount as sadaqah. If he extends the due date beyond what was originally agreed upon, then for every day extended he is bestowed with a reward for offering that same amount as sadaqah.
full: The one who gives Qardan Hasanaa is bestowed with the reward of offering that amount as sadaqah. If he extends the due date beyond what was originally agreed upon, then for every day extended he is bestowed with a reward for offering that same amount as sadaqah.

cipher: If a man offers each of the five obligatory namaaz in congregation, assume every good of him and endorse his testimony.
full: If a man offers each of the five obligatory namaaz in congregation, assume every good of him and endorse his testimony.

cipher: When a man's intention in carrying out an act pertaining to the hereafter is solely for a worldly purpose, then he has no share in the hereafter.
full: When a man's intention in carrying out an act pertaining to the hereafter is solely for a worldly purpose, then he has no share in the hereafter.

cipher: Allah Ta'ala will come to the assistance of he who assists his brother.
full: Allah Ta'ala will come to the assistance of he who assists his brother.

cipher: Mumineen are amenable and mild-mannered.
full: Mumineen are amenable and mild-mannered.

cipher: To regret is to repent.
full: To regret is to repent.

cipher: The sight of greenery improves one's vision.
full: The sight of greenery improves one's vision.

cipher: A Mumin's intention is more honourable than his deed, and a non-believer's intention is more malicious than his action.
full: A Mumin's intention is more honourable than his deed, and a non-believer's intention is more malicious than his action.

cipher: Solitude is better than companionship of the vile. However, companionship of the virtuous is better than solitude.
full: Solitude is better than companionship of the vile. However, companionship of the virtuous is better than solitude.

cipher: Venerate your masjids, keep them clean, ensure that they are made fragrant with incense at least once every seven days and provide means of attaining tahaarat therein.
full: Venerate your masjids, keep them clean, ensure that they are made fragrant with incense at least once every seven days and provide means of attaining tahaarat therein.

cipher: Facilitate; do not hinder.
full: Facilitate; do not hinder.

cipher: Fear a Mumin's tear: it will destroy the one responsible for it and extinguish oceans of hellfire for the Mumin who shed it.
full: Fear a Mumin's tear: it will destroy the one responsible for it and extinguish oceans of hellfire for the Mumin who shed it.

cipher: Beware of negligence for it robs you of blessings.
full: Beware of negligence for it robs you of blessings.

cipher: When Allah Ta'ala burdens a man with an illness, He forgives his sins according to the extent of his illness.
full: When Allah Ta'ala burdens a man with an illness, He forgives his sins according to the extent of his illness.

cipher: The most valuable of treasures is hearts filled with love. Treasure the love and affection that others have for you.
full: The most valuable of treasures is hearts filled with love. Treasure the love and affection that others have for you.

cipher: A man's vanity is proof of his feeble-mindedness.
full: A man's vanity is proof of his feeble-mindedness.

cipher: When Allah Ta'ala has determined livelihood for you, know that wherever it may be it will make its way to you. However, if He chooses to deprive you of it, then you will be incapable of acquiring it, whether by cunning, might or the advice of men. Therefore, shorten your stride (have faith in Allah Ta'ala), for you will be unable to overtake what Allah Ta'ala has decreed, regardless of your guile.
full: When Allah Ta'ala has determined livelihood for you, know that wherever it may be it will make its way to you. However, if He chooses to deprive you of it, then you will be incapable of acquiring it, whether by cunning, might or the advice of men. Therefore, shorten your stride (have faith in Allah Ta'ala), for you will be unable to overtake what Allah Ta'ala has decreed, regardless of your guile.

cipher: Whatever you do, make sure it is neither to please and impress others nor to acquire fame. When a man's actions are for someone other than Allah Ta'ala, He hands these actions over to the one he intended to please.
full: Whatever you do, make sure it is neither to please and impress others nor to acquire fame. When a man's actions are for someone other than Allah Ta'ala, He hands these actions over to the one he intended to please.

cipher: Safety and well-being are the greatest blessings one has ever received.
full: Safety and well-being are the greatest blessings one has ever received.

cipher: The least of your obligations to Allah Ta'ala is to not misuse His blessings and bounties in disobeying Him.
full: The least of your obligations to Allah Ta'ala is to not misuse His blessings and bounties in disobeying Him.

cipher: Do good and do not belittle any part of it. Even a small act of good is truly great, and even a few acts are surely plentiful.
full: Do good and do not belittle any part of it. Even a small act of good is truly great, and even a few acts are surely plentiful.

cipher: The worst of shortcomings is to criticise someone for a fault that you yourself possess.
full: The worst of shortcomings is to criticise someone for a fault that you yourself possess.

cipher: What I fear for you most is: succumbing to whims and fancies, having unrealistic expectations and longing for something incessantly.
full: What I fear for you most is: succumbing to whims and fancies, having unrealistic expectations and longing for something incessantly.

cipher: Loyalty is the twin of honesty.
full: Loyalty is the twin of honesty.

cipher: Indeed, the completion of faith lies in seeking knowledge and acting in accordance with it.
full: Indeed, the completion of faith lies in seeking knowledge and acting in accordance with it.

cipher: He will not reach the door of jannat who gorges on the fruits of disobedience.
full: He will not reach the door of jannat who gorges on the fruits of disobedience.

cipher: I despise a man who is indolent in worldly matters; if he is indolent in his worldly matters, then he will be even more so when it comes to matters of his hereafter.
full: I despise a man who is indolent in worldly matters; if he is indolent in his worldly matters, then he will be even more so when it comes to matters of his hereafter.

cipher: Hatred and malice are prevented by being prudent.
full: Hatred and malice are prevented by being prudent.

cipher: Many a time have I observed that Rasulullah SA would drink water in three breaths. With each breath, he would invoke the name of Allah Ta'ala by reciting bismillah al-rahmaan al-raheem before he began to drink and thank Him with alhamdolillah when he finished.
full: Many a time have I observed that Rasulullah SA would drink water in three breaths. With each breath, he would invoke the name of Allah Ta'ala by reciting bismillah al-rahmaan al-raheem before he began to drink and thank Him with alhamdolillah when he finished.

cipher: Humility is the stairway to nobility.
full: Humility is the stairway to nobility.

cipher: If you require validation that poverty is better than wealth and that the impoverished is better than the wealthy, it is in the fact that you will encounter one who has become arrogant and unjust because of his wealth, yet you will not come across anyone who has become so due to poverty.
full: If you require validation that poverty is better than wealth and that the impoverished is better than the wealthy, it is in the fact that you will encounter one who has become arrogant and unjust because of his wealth, yet you will not come across anyone who has become so due to poverty.

cipher: The meaning of zohd can be fully understood by the following two phrases: Allah Ta'ala states, 'So that you may not grieve for that which escapes you, nor rejoice over favours bestowed upon you.' The person who neither feels regret over what has passed nor rejoices over what he receives has grasped zohd by both its ends (achieved complete zohd).
full: The meaning of zohd can be fully understood by the following two phrases: Allah Ta'ala states, 'So that you may not grieve for that which escapes you, nor rejoice over favours bestowed upon you.' The person who neither feels regret over what has passed nor rejoices over what he receives has grasped zohd by both its ends (achieved complete zohd).

cipher: The worst of all things [for a man] are: being chronically ill, being both poor and decrepit, committing vile deeds despite nearing death.
full: The worst of all things [for a man] are: being chronically ill, being both poor and decrepit, committing vile deeds despite nearing death.

cipher: Satan is very fond of the residue and smell left over from a meal on one's hand. When one of you goes to bed, he should be sure to wash his hands and eliminate this smell.
full: Satan is very fond of the residue and smell left over from a meal on one's hand. When one of you goes to bed, he should be sure to wash his hands and eliminate this smell.

cipher: The mark of imaan is to: choose truth over falsehood, even if it seemed the truth was to harm you and falsehood was to benefit, not speak about matters beyond the limits of your understanding, fear and be conscious of Allah Ta'ala when speaking about others.
full: The mark of imaan is to: choose truth over falsehood, even if it seemed the truth was to harm you and falsehood was to benefit, not speak about matters beyond the limits of your understanding, fear and be conscious of Allah Ta'ala when speaking about others.

cipher: You must always: adhere to halaal, show the utmost kindness and concern for your family, engross yourself in the zikr and remembrance of Allah Ta'ala in all circumstances.
full: You must always: adhere to halaal, show the utmost kindness and concern for your family, engross yourself in the zikr and remembrance of Allah Ta'ala in all circumstances.

cipher: Visiting the ill to enquire into their health should only be done after three days into their illness.
full: Visiting the ill to enquire into their health should only be done after three days into their illness.

cipher: Repay a person who has shown kindness to you with an act of even greater kindness.
full: Repay a person who has shown kindness to you with an act of even greater kindness.

cipher: If you aspire to be well mannered then it suffices you to avoid that which you dislike in others.
full: If you aspire to be well mannered then it suffices you to avoid that which you dislike in others.

cipher: Words are bound by you for as long as you do not utter them. The moment you do, you are bound by them.
full: Words are bound by you for as long as you do not utter them. The moment you do, you are bound by them.

cipher: Complete perfection is in: understanding the intricacies of Shariat, remaining patient during misfortune, planning and organising one's life.
full: Complete perfection is in: understanding the intricacies of Shariat, remaining patient during misfortune, planning and organising one's life.

cipher: Always be content with what fate decrees [for you].
full: Always be content with what fate decrees [for you].

cipher: Be slow to anger, quick to calm down and inclined towards readily accepting [others'] excuses.
full: Be slow to anger, quick to calm down and inclined towards readily accepting [others'] excuses.

cipher: When situations become bitter let your patience be sweet.
full: When situations become bitter let your patience be sweet.

cipher: Occupy yourself with that for which you have been made accountable.
full: Occupy yourself with that for which you have been made accountable.

cipher: Always fulfil your promises and honour your vows.
full: Always fulfil your promises and honour your vows.

cipher: When eating do not sit reclined as tyrants do, or cross-legged.
full: When eating do not sit reclined as tyrants do, or cross-legged.

cipher: There is no trade like good deeds as there is no profit like divine reward.
full: There is no trade like good deeds as there is no profit like divine reward.

cipher: Amirul Mumineen SA advised his esteemed son Moulana al-Imam al-Hasan SA: Do not seek to engage others in confrontation. However, if it is you who is sought, be sure to respond. The one who seeks confrontation is an aggressor and an aggressor will eventually fall.
full: Amirul Mumineen SA advised his esteemed son Moulana al-Imam al-Hasan SA: Do not seek to engage others in confrontation. However, if it is you who is sought, be sure to respond. The one who seeks confrontation is an aggressor and an aggressor will eventually fall.

cipher: A man who devotes himself to the construction of masjids and frequents them, never sparing any effort whether he be standing or sitting, cannot be compared to one who out of arrogance and hatred passes by at such a distance that he avoids even its dust.
full: A man who devotes himself to the construction of masjids and frequents them, never sparing any effort whether he be standing or sitting, cannot be compared to one who out of arrogance and hatred passes by at such a distance that he avoids even its dust.

cipher: Your brother's resolve to sever relations with you should not be firmer than your resolve to maintain them. Nor should his determination to wrong you be stronger than your determination to show kindness.
full: Your brother's resolve to sever relations with you should not be firmer than your resolve to maintain them. Nor should his determination to wrong you be stronger than your determination to show kindness.

cipher: Tomorrow, one can hope to earn more than what may have been lost of his livelihood. However, one cannot hope today to regain moments of life that have passed by yesterday.
full: Tomorrow, one can hope to earn more than what may have been lost of his livelihood. However, one cannot hope today to regain moments of life that have passed by yesterday.

cipher: This world is like a snake: soft to the touch but full of deadly poison. The gullible and foolish are drawn towards it, yet the wise and prudent remain wary.
full: This world is like a snake: soft to the touch but full of deadly poison. The gullible and foolish are drawn towards it, yet the wise and prudent remain wary.

cipher: A person who buys what he does not need will end up selling what he does.
full: A person who buys what he does not need will end up selling what he does.

cipher: What fruitless toil it is that man collects that which he eats not, builds that in which he dwells not! Finally, he dies and goes forth towards Allah Ta'ala unable to carry with him any wealth, powerless to move what he has built.
full: What fruitless toil it is that man collects that which he eats not, builds that in which he dwells not! Finally, he dies and goes forth towards Allah Ta'ala unable to carry with him any wealth, powerless to move what he has built.

cipher: When a man humbles himself before someone who does not respect him and desires someone who rebuffs him, then he is his own tormentor.
full: When a man humbles himself before someone who does not respect him and desires someone who rebuffs him, then he is his own tormentor.

cipher: One who finds justice restrictive, will find deviating from it even more so.
full: One who finds justice restrictive, will find deviating from it even more so.

cipher: A man's bad temper will lead him to his ruin.
full: A man's bad temper will lead him to his ruin.

cipher: Amirul Mumineen SA was asked what was meant by 'sincere repentance'. He replied: It is: heartfelt regret, supplication for forgiveness, resolve to never commit the same sin again.
full: Amirul Mumineen SA was asked what was meant by 'sincere repentance'. He replied: It is: heartfelt regret, supplication for forgiveness, resolve to never commit the same sin again.

cipher: By Allah Ta'ala, I have not seen a man benefit from his taqwaa unless he guards his tongue as he would a treasure.
full: By Allah Ta'ala, I have not seen a man benefit from his taqwaa unless he guards his tongue as he would a treasure.

cipher: Amirul Mumineen SA advised Moulana al-Imam al-Hasan SA, 'My dear son, be tightfisted with your life so that you do not end up wasting it in doing things that are detrimental instead of being beneficial.'
full: Amirul Mumineen SA advised Moulana al-Imam al-Hasan SA, 'My dear son, be tightfisted with your life so that you do not end up wasting it in doing things that are detrimental instead of being beneficial.'

cipher: Giving zakaat has never lessened wealth.
full: Giving zakaat has never lessened wealth.

cipher: The pure sadaqah is the sadaqah of the man who has given it from what he has earned by the sweat of his brow, his face covered in dust.
full: The pure sadaqah is the sadaqah of the man who has given it from what he has earned by the sweat of his brow, his face covered in dust.

cipher: The consumer of intoxicants is from amongst the impious and the wicked.
full: The consumer of intoxicants is from amongst the impious and the wicked.

cipher: I do not see death as anything but good fortune.
full: I do not see death as anything but good fortune.

cipher: When you find people preoccupied with pleasing the created, then occupy yourself with pleasing the Creator.
full: When you find people preoccupied with pleasing the created, then occupy yourself with pleasing the Creator.

cipher: When you find people preoccupied with material prosperity, then occupy yourself with achieving prosperity in the hereafter.
full: When you find people preoccupied with material prosperity, then occupy yourself with achieving prosperity in the hereafter.

cipher: When you find people preoccupied with superficial beauty, then occupy yourself with inner purity.
full: When you find people preoccupied with superficial beauty, then occupy yourself with inner purity.

cipher: When you find people preoccupied with finding faults in others, then occupy yourself with finding and rectifying yours.
full: When you find people preoccupied with finding faults in others, then occupy yourself with finding and rectifying yours.

cipher: When you find people preoccupied with the number of their obligatory deeds, then occupy yourself with ensuring the sincerity of yours.
full: When you find people preoccupied with the number of their obligatory deeds, then occupy yourself with ensuring the sincerity of yours.

cipher: I am fond of a man who relishes dates, for Rasulullah - Allah Ta'ala's salawaat upon him - was very fond of them.
full: I am fond of a man who relishes dates, for Rasulullah - Allah Ta'ala's salawaat upon him - was very fond of them.

cipher: You should: be truthful in your words, honour the promises you make to your friends as well as your enemies, help one another with your wealth, foster sincere love for one another, give sadaqah to the poor, come together for your cause, not be deceitful or disloyal to anyone, not entertain doubts after certitude, not retreat out of cowardice after having boldly come forward.
full: You should: be truthful in your words, honour the promises you make to your friends as well as your enemies, help one another with your wealth, foster sincere love for one another, give sadaqah to the poor, come together for your cause, not be deceitful or disloyal to anyone, not entertain doubts after certitude, not retreat out of cowardice after having boldly come forward.

cipher: Our followers do not whine like dogs nor crave greedily like ravens. They will not ask of anyone save their brothers, even if they may die of hunger.
full: Our followers do not whine like dogs nor crave greedily like ravens. They will not ask of anyone save their brothers, even if they may die of hunger.

cipher: It befits a woman that her hands always be dyed with henna. She should apply it, even if a little and even if she is elderly.
full: It befits a woman that her hands always be dyed with henna. She should apply it, even if a little and even if she is elderly.

cipher: Not a single one of you should ever turn his back on his loved ones.
full: Not a single one of you should ever turn his back on his loved ones.

cipher: Moulana al-Imam Mohammed al-Baqir SA was asked, 'If a man was called to a funeral and a waleemah, both taking place at the same time, which should he attend?' 'The funeral,' Imam replied, 'for attending funerals causes one to remember death and the hereafter, whilst attending a waleemah makes one forget them both.'
full: Moulana al-Imam Mohammed al-Baqir SA was asked, 'If a man was called to a funeral and a waleemah, both taking place at the same time, which should he attend?' 'The funeral,' Imam replied, 'for attending funerals causes one to remember death and the hereafter, whilst attending a waleemah makes one forget them both.'

cipher: Adhere to the taqwaa of Allah Ta'ala and be a good friend to your friends, and a good neighbour to your neighbours.
full: Adhere to the taqwaa of Allah Ta'ala and be a good friend to your friends, and a good neighbour to your neighbours.

cipher: When a person picks up a discarded date or a piece of bread from the ground, wipes it clean and eats it, it will not settle in his stomach but he will be assured of jannat.
full: When a person picks up a discarded date or a piece of bread from the ground, wipes it clean and eats it, it will not settle in his stomach but he will be assured of jannat.

cipher: Indeed, committing sins deprives one of livelihood.
full: Indeed, committing sins deprives one of livelihood.

cipher: Livelihood hastens towards a person who feeds others faster than a knife pierces a camel's hump.
full: Livelihood hastens towards a person who feeds others faster than a knife pierces a camel's hump.

cipher: A nabi complained of frailty to Allah Ta'ala. Through divine revelation, Allah Ta'ala instructed him, 'Prepare a dish of meat cooked with milk and consume it, for I have placed barakat in them both.' He did so and Allah Ta'ala restored his strength and vigour.
full: A nabi complained of frailty to Allah Ta'ala. Through divine revelation, Allah Ta'ala instructed him, 'Prepare a dish of meat cooked with milk and consume it, for I have placed barakat in them both.' He did so and Allah Ta'ala restored his strength and vigour.
